role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal market circumstances, the fund will maintain at least 80% exposure to financial instruments that provide two times leveraged exposure to the daily performance of CPNG. It is non-diversified.
